home.title: Smart Wash Premium Services

hero.desc1: Premium dry cleaning and laundry service with free doorstep pickup.

servicesSectionCustom.label: Our Services
servicesSectionCustom.title:
Everything You Need,
Perfectly Clean.
servicesSectionCustom.subtitle: Download the app now and get free pickup, delivery, and 20% off your first order.
servicesSectionCustom.card1Desc: Fresh washed & neatly folded, packed in a convenient bag
servicesSectionCustom.card2Desc: Professional treatment and premium care for suits & silk fabrics
servicesSectionCustom.card3Desc: Quick iron & press, returned on high-quality hangers
servicesSectionCustom.card4Desc: Same-day express delivery for basic everyday garments
servicesSectionCustom.card5Desc: Deep clean and sanitize bedsheets, towels, and household linens
servicesSectionCustom.card6Desc: Regular ironing bundle for shirts, trousers, and skirts

howItWorksSection.label: How It Works
howItWorksSection.title:
Four Simple Steps To
Fresh & Clean.
howItWorksSection.step1Desc: Choose a date and time that works for you through our app or website.
howItWorksSection.step2Desc: Our driver arrives at your door with laundry bags — no sorting needed.
howItWorksSection.step3Desc: We wash, clean, and press your garments according to their care labels.
howItWorksSection.step4Desc: Clean, fresh, and perfectly presented — right to your doorstep.

servicesSection.label: Why Smart Wash
servicesSection.title:
Built For People Who
Value Their Time.
servicesSection.card1Desc: From pickup to delivery within 24 hours, same-day express also available.
servicesSection.card2Desc: Every garment insured up to 500 AED, full responsibility for rare damage.
servicesSection.card3Desc: Track your order from pickup to delivery with accurate real-time updates.
servicesSection.card4Desc: Biodegradable detergents used with energy-efficient machines for clean care.

testimonials.label: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.item1Quote: I really appreciate how straightforward the laundry service is and how quickly their customer support responds. I can't see myself managing without it.
testimonials.item2Quote: Smart Wash has completely changed how I manage my laundry. Excellent service and pristine dry cleaning every single time.
testimonials.item3Quote: The 24-hour turnaround is a lifesaver. I scheduled a pickup at night and received my crisp, clean suits the next evening.
testimonials.item4Quote: Outstanding support and incredibly convenient app. The tracking feature is super precise and the laundry smells absolutely amazing.
